speaker: Argo
text: Professor, thank you so much!

speaker: Celio
text: I should say the same. I can’t thank you enough.

speaker: Argo
text: Huh? Me?

speaker: Celio
text: From what I gathered, you helped Prince Theo on that deserted island.

speaker: Argo
text: Well... I'm just a country boy who happens to have some experience with that sort of thing.

speaker: Celio
text: And Prince Theo was able to return thanks to that.

speaker: Celio
text: You saved your friend’s life, Argo. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Professor... *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: Now that his body has been completely healed, he should be back to his old self when he wakes up.

speaker: Celio
text: Please make sure to check up on him. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: ...I will!!

speaker: Argo
text: Ah, that reminds me… I wanted to talk to you about my cards.

speaker: Celio
text: Yes, what is it? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: I... can see the future with them. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: The future...?

speaker: Argo
text: I saw the future... where Theo dies on that island.

speaker: Argo
text: All I could do was... watch him die in my arms… *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text:
The feeling, the emotions, they were all so real...
Maybe they were memories of an experience...?

speaker: Argo
text: It’s like I could feel it with my cards, even if it was just for a moment.

speaker: Argo
text: But it disappeared from my head in an instant, like a fleeting memory...

speaker: Argo
text: But I think... I was able to help Theo because I saw it. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: ...Perhaps it was your own memory of a possible future.

speaker: Argo
text: A possible future...?

speaker: Celio
text: There is no single future, Argo. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: The number of possibilities spread out like the branches of a tree. Each one represents a future path.

speaker: Celio
text: You must have remembered one of those many futures and transferred it across time. *

speaker: Celio
text: These... "future memories" have information we normally can't access. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: You obtained unobtainable information and created a path for a new future.

speaker: Celio
text: That is how you saved Prince Theo.

speaker: Argo
text: Obtain unobtainable information... and make a new future...

speaker: Celio
text: Your E.P... must transfer memories to you when you reach points where future paths split.

speaker: Celio
text: I... have never heard of such an E.P. In fact, there are very few records of any kind that can interfere with time. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: ...it appears Lord Scheat was correct. Your E.P. is quite special. *

speaker: Argo
text: I... guess it is.

speaker: Celio
text: It is leagues better than an E.P. like mine. You should have confidence.

speaker: Argo
text: "I... I don't understand." *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Um... Professor Celio. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: Yes? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: I know you say your E.P. isn't a big deal, but…

speaker: Argo
text: If it wasn’t for you, I wouldn’t have been able to save Theo. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: I’m glad you’re here… Thanks to you, Theo’s still alive. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: I think your E.P. is the best kind… It can save lives. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: ...That is true. I suppose it isn’t too bad if it allows me to help my students.

speaker: Argo
text: That’s right! You should have confidence! *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: Ahahaha, it’s getting hard to tell who the real professor is here. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Eheheh.

speaker: Celio
text: You students may not know it, but... being a Knights College professor is much more interesting than one would expect.

speaker: Celio
text: ...Now then, you must be tired too. You should go rest in your room.

speaker: Argo
text: I will.

speaker: Celio
text: Um... Argo.

speaker: Argo
text: Yes?

speaker: Celio
text: ...Thank you.

speaker: Argo
text: You said that earlier, you know. 🐾

speaker: Celio
text: No, for much more than that.

speaker: Argo
text: "……?" *A paw print*

speaker: Celio
text: It’s nothing. Well then, I shall see you in lecture.

speaker: Argo
text: Okay!
I bow to the professor, then return to my room. *sigh*
